_publications._publicationTitle: Integrative genomic analyses of neurofibromatosis tumours identify SOX9 as a biomarker and survival gene.

_contextSnippet: Among the 10, the developmentally regulated genes DHH, ERBB3, MPZ, S100β, L1CAM and SOX10 are all down-regulated with respect to normal Schwann cells.
details: S100β is down-regulated in NF1 tumours relative to normal Schwann cells
